revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '{{神社 |名称 = 栗原神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 岐阜県高山市上宝町宮原350 |位置 = |祭神 = 五十猛神 など |社格 = 郷社...'
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 栗原神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 岐阜県高山市上宝町宮原350 |位置 = |祭神 = 五十猛神 など |社格 = 郷社 |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 5月3日 |神事 = }}
'''栗原神社'''（くりはらじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[高山市]]上宝町（旧[[吉城郡]][[上宝村]]）にある[[神社]]。高山市上宝支所（旧・上宝村役場）の近くにある。
[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]であり、[[延喜式神名帳]]の[[飛騨国]]内八社の一つである。
[[江戸時代]]には白山権現と称されていた。[[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]）に式内社栗原神社に認められ、栗原神社に改称された。
== 祭神 == *[[五十猛神]] *[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇大神]] *[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]] *[[イザナミ|伊邪那美命]] *[[イザナギ|伊邪那岐命]] *[[菊理媛神|菊理姫命]] *[[カグツチ|火産霊神]]
== 交通 == *[[濃飛乗合自動車|濃飛バス]]上宝・平湯線「栗原」バス停下車
{{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:くりはらしんしや}} [[Category:郷社]] [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:高山市]]

{{神社 |名称 = 栗原神社 |画像 = |所在地 = 岐阜県高山市上宝町宮原350 |位置 = |祭神 = 五十猛神 など |社格 = 郷社 |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = 5月3日 |神事 = }}

[[延喜式神名帳|式内社]]であり、[[延喜式神名帳]]の[[飛騨国]]内八社の一つである。
[[江戸時代]]には[[白山権現]]と称されていた。[[明治]]3年（[[1870年]]）に式内社栗原神社に認められ、栗原神社に改称された。
== 祭神 == *[[五十猛神]] *[[オオヤマツミ|大山祇大神]] *[[ウカノミタマ|宇迦之御魂神]] *[[イザナミ|伊邪那美命]] *[[イザナギ|伊邪那岐命]] *[[菊理媛神|菊理姫命]] *[[カグツチ|火産霊神]]
== 文化財 == *栗原神社のスギ（市指定文化財）<ref>{{Cite web |date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=天然記念物 |publisher=高山市 |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== 交通 == *[[濃飛乗合自動車|濃飛バス]]上宝・平湯線「栗原」バス停下車

revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kurihara Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Kurihara shrine.jpg|300px]] | location=[[Gifu Prefecture]] [[Takayama City]], Kamitakara Town, Miyahara 350 | coordinates={{Coord|36|17|9.60|N|137|22|19.51|E|scale:30000}} | deity=[[Itakeru no Mikoto]], and others | type={{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}}, {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} | consecration_year=Unknown | Main Festival=May 3 }}
'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Takayama City]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} for [[Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現}}. In the 3rd year of the [[Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyama-tsumi no Ōkami|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagutsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧}}
== Notes == {{Reflist}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kurihara Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=[[File:Kurihara shrine.jpg|300px]] | location=[[Gifu Prefecture]] [[Takayama City]], Kamitakara Town, Miyahara 350 | coordinates={{Coord|36|17|9.60|N|137|22|19.51|E|scale:30000}} | deity=[[Itakeru no Mikoto]], and others | type={{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}}, {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社}} | consecration_year=Unknown | Main Festival=May 3 }}
'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Takayama City]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} for [[Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現}}. In the 3rd year of the [[Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyama-tsumi no Ōkami|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagutsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Takayama City]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳}} for [[Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現}}. In the 3rd year of the [[Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[Shinto shrine]] located in [[Takayama City]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|12=draft}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|12=draft}} for [[Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=draft}}. In the 3rd year of the [[Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagutsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=draft}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=draft}}
== Notes == {{Reflist}}

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft|1=Shikinaisha|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:栗原神社 (高山市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11535866]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kurihara Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:Kurihara shrine.jpg | location=[[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], Kamitakara Town, Miyahara 350 | coordinates={{Coord|36.286|N|137.372083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity=[[Itakeru no Mikoto]], and others | type={{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | consecration_year=Unknown | Main Festival=May 3 | prefecture={{ill|Takayama|WD=Q622594}} }}
'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Reflist}}

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:栗原神社 (高山市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11535866]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:45, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kurihara Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:Kurihara shrine.jpg | location=[[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], Kamitakara Town, Miyahara 350 | coordinates={{Coord|36.286|N|137.372083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity=[[Itakeru no Mikoto]], and others | type={{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | consecration_year=Unknown | Main Festival=May 3 | prefecture={{ill|Takayama|WD=Q622594}} }}
'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Reflist}}

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Reflist}}

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], within the Kamitakara area (formerly [[:en:Yoshiki District|Yoshiki District]], [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.

The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Reflist}}

The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for [[:en:Hida Province|Hida Province]], being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * [[:en:Izanami|Izanami no Mikoto]] * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, within the Kamitakara area (formerly {{ill|Yoshiki District|en|Yoshiki District|WD=Q8056119|lt=Yoshiki District}}, [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}
== Notes == {{Reflist}}

'''Kurihara Shrine (Takayama) (Q11535866)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, within the Kamitakara area (formerly {{ill|Yoshiki District|en|Yoshiki District|WD=Q8056119|lt=Yoshiki District}}, [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]

The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|ja|飛騨国の式内社一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Shikinaisha in Hida Province|qq=}}

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, within the Kamitakara area (formerly {{ill|Yoshiki District|en|Yoshiki District|WD=Q8056119|lt=Yoshiki District}}, [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

'''Kurihara Shrine (Takayama) (Q11535866)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hida Province]].

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, within the Kamitakara area (formerly {{ill|Yoshiki District|en|Yoshiki District|WD=Q8056119|lt=Yoshiki District}}, [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.

'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, within the Kamitakara area (formerly {{ill|Yoshiki District|en|Yoshiki District|WD=Q8056119|lt=Yoshiki District}}, [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kurihara Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:Kurihara shrine.jpg | location={{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}} [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], Kamitakara Town, Miyahara 350 | coordinates={{Coord|36.286|N|137.372083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity=[[Itakeru no Mikoto]], and others | type={{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | consecration_year=Unknown | Main Festival=May 3 | prefecture={{ill|Takayama|WD=Q622594}} }}
'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, within the Kamitakara area (formerly {{ill|Yoshiki District|en|Yoshiki District|WD=Q8056119|lt=Yoshiki District}}, [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name=Kurihara Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image=File:Kurihara shrine.jpg | location={{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}} [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], Kamitakara Town, Miyahara 350 | coordinates={{Coord|36.286|N|137.372083|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity=[[Itakeru no Mikoto]], and others | type={{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, {{ill|Gōsha|ja|郷社|1=Gō-sha|WD=Q134917316}}{{efn|District Shrines|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gōsha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}} | consecration_year=Unknown | Main Festival=May 3 | prefecture={{ill|Takayama|WD=Q622594}} }}
'''Kurihara Shrine''' (栗原神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[:en:Takayama City|Takayama City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, within the Kamitakara area (formerly {{ill|Yoshiki District|en|Yoshiki District|WD=Q8056119|lt=Yoshiki District}}, [[Kamitakara Village]]). It is situated near the Kamitakara Branch Office of Takayama City (formerly the Kamitakara Village Office).
The shrine is identified as one of the {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} listed in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}} for {{ill|Hida Province|en|Hida Province|WD=Q1056535|lt=Hida Province}}, being one of eight such shrines in the region.
During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the shrine was known as {{ill|Hakusan Gongen|ja|白山権現|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hakusan Gongen|qq=}}. In the 3rd year of the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} (1870), it was officially recognized as the Shikinaisha Kurihara Shrine and renamed accordingly.
== Enshrined Deities == * [[Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|Itakeru no Mikoto]] (五十猛神) * [[Ōyamatsumi|Ōyamatsumi no Ōkami]] * [[Ukanomitama no Kami|Uka no Mitama no Kami]] * {{ill|Izanami|en|Izanami|WD=Q682306|lt=Izanami no Mikoto}} * [[Izanagi|Izanagi no Mikoto]] * [[Kukurihime|Kukurihime no Kami]] * [[Kagu-tsuchi|Hi no Kagutsuchi no Kami]]
== Cultural Properties == * '''Kurihara Shrine’s Cedar Tree''' - Designated as a Takayama City Cultural Property.<ref>{{Cite web|language=ja|date= |url=http://www.city.takayama.lg.jp/bunkazai/bunkazai/tennnennkinennbutu/index.htm |title=Natural Monuments |publisher=Takayama City |accessdate=2013-04-21}}</ref>
== Access == * Take the {{ill|Nōhi Bus|ja|濃飛バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nōhi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 濃飛乗合自動車|1=Nohi Noriai Jidosha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11566124}} Kamitakara/Hirayu Line and get off at "Miyahara" bus stop.
